name: Oven-Fried Honey Chicken -NHB
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons balsamic vinegar or red wine vinegar
6 skinless boneless chicken breast halves or approximately 2 pounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow bowl, whisk together the honey and vinegar.
2. Pour the bread crumbs into a separate bowl.
3. Set the bowls aside.
4. Spread the oil over foil-lined baking pan large enough to hold all chicken pieces in one layer.
5. Roll each chicken piece in the honey mixture, then coat it with bread crumbs.
6. Place the coated chicken pieces in the prepared pan.
7. Bake at 375°F for 30 minutes, or until cooked through.
[Makes 4 servings. Nutrients Per Serving: Calories: 448 Sodium: 441 mg Carbohydrates: 46.9 g Protein: 45.7 g Cholesterol: 103 mg Dietary Fiber: 1.62 g Total Fat: 7.62 g Calories from Fat: 16%]
